name: December Surprise
description:
"Just end this."

"You can't save this, not this time."

This is a Deltarune AU, here, YOU, the angel, have freedom. Just a little more control, and with just that, you get to this.

This will be the end, and you're in YOUR POV. It's you.

You can do whatever you want, You can do whatever you want, just remember that you have to be STRONG.Enough to be able to proceed with what nobody wants to do.
creator: Efz.19
